articles.title: Elon Musk Will Always Have Support of DOGE Community: Major Dogecoin Account
articles.description: Owner of one of major Dogecoin Twitter accounts has promised that Elon Musk’s support to Dogecoin and its community will be mutually beneficial

articles.title: Derivatives data suggests Solana has reached a short-term top
articles.description: SOL's futures open interest recently hit $1 billion and while the recent price swing liquidated leveraged longs, data suggests the short-term top is not a bearish trend reversal.

articles.title: Does Fantom’s entry in the NFT space give it one up on Ethereum
articles.description: After Polygon, Binance Smart Chain, and Solana have been gaining strength in the NFT space recently. They are now being joined by Fantom. articles.title: Can Bitcoin Surpass $6,000,000? Ethereum and Polkadot Creator Details Possible Future of Crypto
articles.description: Early Bitcoin developer and co-founder of Ethereum and Polkadot, Gavin Andresen, is outlining a future where BTC rises to a staggering $6,000,000 per coin. Gavin Andresen, who took over as Bitcoin’s lead maintainer from founder Satoshi Nakamoto in 2011, just published a new blog post detailing how BTC’s theoretical evolution could look. Andresen describes a “possible” […]

articles.title: Cardano Partners with Chainlink to Integrate Oracles for Advanced Smart Contracts
articles.description: Cardano joins forces with Chainlink to provide extra support for developers building smart contracts by integrating oracles

articles.title: XRP Has Great Risk-Reward Ratio, With 10x Price Rise Likely: Macro Guru Raoul Pal
articles.description: Raoul Pal is saying that global payments asset XRP has a great risk-reward ratio despite a lawsuit filed by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). articles.title: Huobi Exchange Stops Accepting Chinese Users After Crypto Crackdown
articles.description: China's largest Bitcoin Exchange Huobi has implemented a measure to stop mainland Chinese residents from registering on its platform by preventing the addition of accounts with Chinese mainland phone numbers, to comply with recent Chinese crackdown on crypto.

articles.title: Bitcoin Price Analysis: China FUD Caused Heavy Liquidations, Is the Bottom In?
articles.description: Just as Bitcoin rallied slightly above $45k on Friday, recycled news on China’s central bank vowing to ban crypto trading for Chinese citizens came out, liquidating more than $600 million of derivative positions at the time of writing. It is crucial to remember that large liquidations tend to cause cascades of forced sell orders, creating […]

articles.title: XRP, Chainlink and This Crypto Project Launching Bitcoin Smart Contracts Are ‘About To Go Crazy’, Says Altcoin Daily
articles.description: Altcoin Daily host Austin Arnold is listing three altcoins that he says are “about to go crazy”. articles.title: RippleX Grants $2 Million to Promote NFT Solutions on the XRP Ledger
articles.description: NFTs on Ripple's blockchain? Who would have thought! RippleX just gave over $2 Million in grants for developers working on NFT solutions for XRPL

articles.title: DeFi Hack: Vee Finance Losses $35 Million To Hackers Following Mainnet Launch
articles.description: One of the major threats to businesses online, not only the crypto industry, is cybercriminals’ attacks. Even though the existing networks are supposed to be safe and secure, attackers often find loopholes to exploit them in the bid to steal investors’ funds. This is not new in the online world. There have been occasions when hackers even forced companies to shut down. The decentralized...
